description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a high, leafy green hedge that forms a square perimeter around the property. The front features a gated entrance with a paved walkway leading to the main door, flanked by symmetrical rows of tall, narrow shrubs and a circular arrangement of decorative plants. The building itself is rectangular with a flat roof, large windows on the front facade, and a minimalist design with clean lines and light-colored exterior walls. The rear and side views show a continuation of the hedge boundary, with a spacious open yard and a paved area adjacent to the house. The windows are primarily concentrated on the front, with minimal fenestration on the sides and rear. The overall setting suggests a private, enclosed residential property with a focus on modern landscaping and security.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and surrounded by a tall, leafy hedge and gated entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, paved walkway, symmetrical landscaping, and large front windows.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the flat roof, paved side area, and the hedge boundary extending around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall with minimal windows and the continuous hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the flat roof, side yard, and the hedge perimeter.
